vocab.meaning: đưa ra quyết định, làm chủ tình thế
vocab.example: I enjoy being the driver because I get to call the shots regarding the route and the departure time.

vocab.meaning: đóng vai trò phụ, để người khác điều khiển (nghĩa bóng)
vocab.example: When I'm feeling exhausted, I’m more than happy to take a back seat and let my friend handle the navigation.

vocab.meaning: thong thả ngắm nhìn cuộc sống trôi qua
vocab.example: Being a passenger is wonderful as it allows me to simply sit back and watch the world go by through the window.

vocab.meaning: cảnh giác cao độ, nhìn chăm chú (tìm kiếm gì đó)
vocab.example: As a driver, you have to keep your eyes peeled for sudden hazards, which can be quite taxing over long distances.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi nhịp độ (để thú vị hơn)
vocab.example: I usually drive, but being a passenger is a nice change of pace that lets me relax and enjoy a podcast.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước (làm điều mình giỏi/thích)
vocab.example: My brother is in his element when he's behind the wheel, but I prefer the tranquility of the passenger side.
Driving at a snail's pace in rush hour traffic is incredibly frustrating; I'd much rather be a passenger and read a book then.
It's a luxury to be able to put your feet up and let someone else navigate the complex city streets.

vocab.meaning: theo ý mọi người, không cần tính toán
vocab.example: As a passenger, I just go with the flow and enjoy whatever stops the driver decides to make.

vocab.meaning: duy trì sự tập trung và nhạy bén
vocab.example: Driving requires you to stay on the ball at all times, whereas being a passenger is completely stress-free.
